pathAssistantSteps.info:
Goal: Initial outreach and lead validation.


Guidance:

  • Review incoming lead details for data completeness.
  • Initiate the first contact attempt within 1 hour of lead creation.
  • Research the company or individual via LinkedIn to personalize your opening.

Goal: Discovery and qualification of business needs.


Guidance:

  • Schedule a discovery call to identify pain points and budget.
  • Document key requirements and potential project timelines in the Lead notes.
  • Ensure the lead matches the Residential criteria for the assigned Record Type.

Goal: Successful conversion to an Account and Contact.


Guidance:

  • Confirm all mandatory fields are populated before clicking Mark Status as Complete.
  • Verify that a valid opportunity exists before proceeding with conversion.
  • Ensure the Converted checkbox is correctly triggered upon save.

Goal: Finalize disqualification for future reporting.


Guidance:

  • Clearly document the "Disqualification Reason" (e.g., No Budget, Out of Scope).
  • Set a follow-up task if the lead should be re-evaluated in 6–12 months.
  • Ensure this stage is only selected if the lead is truly a lost prospect.
